Industrial Sealing Portfolio
Products

Explore CHX product families through a structured catalog built around sealing function, hydraulic application, rotary sealing, engineered solutions, and industrial support parts.

创鸿信产品体系 CHX Product System

面向设备制造、液压系统、旋转密封与定制需求的工业密封产品体系 Industrial Sealing Products for Equipment,
Hydraulic, Rotary, and Custom Applications

创鸿信提供密封圈、液压密封件、油封、工程密封件及相关工业配件，服务于设备制造、维修保养和备件替换等多类工业需求。 CHX supplies a broad range of sealing rings, hydraulic seals, oil seals,
engineered sealing components, and related industrial parts for equipment manufacturing, maintenance, and replacement needs.

Category Index

01
液压密封件 Hydraulic Seals

Developed for hydraulic cylinders and reciprocating systems with attention to pressure resistance, wear life, and sealing reliability.

Common materials: PU, NBR, FKM.

Product Count 2

02
密封圈类 Sealing Rings

Core ring-type sealing solutions for static sealing, fitting joints, low-friction motion, and maintenance replacement needs.

Common materials: NBR, FKM, VMQ, EPDM, HNBR, ACM.

Product Count 4

03
油封类 Oil Seals

Focused on rotary shafts, drivetrain systems, and automotive applications with dependable leak control and contamination protection.

Common materials: NBR, ACM, FKM, CR.

Product Count 5

04
气动密封件 Pneumatic Seals

Compact sealing profiles for pneumatic cylinders and air-driven systems, focused on smooth motion, low friction, and reliable air sealing.

Common materials: PU, NBR.

Product Count 5

05
工程密封件 Engineered Seals

High-performance sealing solutions for low friction, precision motion, and demanding pressure or chemical environments.

Common materials: PTFE, filled PTFE, NBR, FKM.

Product Count 2

01

液压密封件 Hydraulic Seals

Developed for hydraulic cylinders and reciprocating systems with attention to pressure resistance, wear life, and sealing reliability.

Common materials: PU, NBR, FKM.

Hydraulic Seals

U型密封 U-Cup

Commonly used in hydraulic cylinder systems with strong pressure sealing and stable service life.

Hydraulic Seals

DH防尘密封 DH Dust Seal

A dust-excluding seal profile used to block contaminants and protect hydraulic rods and cylinders.

02

密封圈类 Sealing Rings

Core ring-type sealing solutions for static sealing, fitting joints, low-friction motion, and maintenance replacement needs.

Common materials: NBR, FKM, VMQ, EPDM, HNBR, ACM.

Product Count

4

Sealing Rings

O型圈 O-Ring

A widely used basic sealing element suitable for static sealing and selected dynamic sealing conditions.

View Details →

Sealing Rings

星型圈 X-Ring

A four-lobe sealing profile that improves stability and reduces rolling in dynamic applications.

View Details →

Sealing Rings

ED圈 ED Ring

Designed for threaded fittings and hydraulic joints to achieve reliable pressure sealing performance.

View Details →

Sealing Rings

O型圈套装 / 修理盒 O-Ring Kits / Repair Box

A maintenance-friendly assortment for fast size selection and on-site replacement work.

03

油封类 Oil Seals

Focused on rotary shafts, drivetrain systems, and automotive applications with dependable leak control and contamination protection.

Common materials: NBR, ACM, FKM, CR.

Product Count

5

Oil Seals

TC骨架油封 TC Oil Seal

A standard rotary shaft sealing solution widely used in automotive and industrial rotating equipment.

View Details →

Oil Seals

VA 水封 VA Water Seal

Used for axial-contact splash protection and contaminant exclusion on rotating shafts in general industrial service.

View Details →

Oil Seals

VS 水封 VS Water Seal

Suitable for rotary equipment that requires a flexible auxiliary sealing element for splash resistance and dirt exclusion.

View Details →

Oil Seals

汽车油封 Automotive Oil Seal

Built for engines, transmissions, and wheel-end systems under automotive operating conditions.

View Details →

Oil Seals

方向机油封 Steering Gear Oil Seal

Specialized for steering systems requiring stable leakage control and durable rotary sealing.

View Details →

气动密封件 Pneumatic Seals

Compact sealing profiles for pneumatic cylinders and air-driven systems, focused on smooth motion, low friction, and reliable air sealing.

Common materials: PU, NBR.

Pneumatic Seals

MYA 系列 MYA Series

Compact pneumatic sealing profiles designed for smooth cylinder motion and stable air retention.

Pneumatic Seals

PDU 系列 PDU Series

Pneumatic seal profiles for reciprocating cylinder applications requiring low friction and reliable sealing.

Pneumatic Seals

PSD 系列 PSD Series

Pneumatic sealing profiles suitable for air cylinder systems with stable dynamic sealing requirements.

Pneumatic Seals

EM 系列 EM Series

Pneumatic seal profiles for general cylinder sealing needs with balanced wear resistance and air retention.

Pneumatic Seals

EU 系列 EU Series

Pneumatic sealing profiles for cylinder assemblies requiring efficient sealing and stable reciprocating performance.

05

工程密封件 Engineered Seals

High-performance sealing solutions for low friction, precision motion, and demanding pressure or chemical environments.

Common materials: PTFE, filled PTFE, NBR, FKM.

Product Count

2

Engineered Seals

格莱圈 / 斯特封 Glyd Rings / Step Seals

Low-friction engineered sealing solutions for hydraulic pistons and rods where sealing efficiency, wear resistance, and smooth reciprocating motion all matter.

View Details →

Engineered Seals

导向带 / 耐磨带 Guide Ring / Wear Ring

Supports guiding and anti-extrusion performance while protecting metallic mating surfaces.
